Question: Sketch the region $$R = \{ ( r , \theta ) | 1 \le r \le 2 , - \frac{\pi}{2} \le \theta \le \frac{\pi}{2} \} ,$$ and evaluate $$\iint_{R} x d A .$$
Evaluate the integral $$\iint_{R} ( 4 - x^{2} - y^{2} ) d A$$ where $$R$$ is the circle of radius $$2$$ on the $$x y$$ -plane.

Evaluate the integral $$\underset{D}{\iint} r^{2} \text{sin}^{2} ( 2 \theta ) r d r d \theta \text{where} D = \{ ( r , \theta ) | - \frac{\mathrm{\pi}}{4} \le \theta \le \frac{\mathrm{\pi}}{4} , \  0 \le r \le 2 \sqrt{\text{cos} 2 \theta} \} .$$
Use polar coordinates to find an iterated integral for finding the volume of the solid enclosed by the paraboloids $$z = x^{2} + y^{2}$$ and $$z = 16 - x^{2} - y^{2} .$$
Answer: $$V = \int_{0}^{2 \pi} \int_{0}^{2 \sqrt{2}} ( 16 - 2 r^{2} ) r d r d \theta = 64 \pi$$ cubic units

Question: Find the area enclosed inside the cardioid $$r = 3 - 3 \text{sin} \theta$$ and outside the cardioid $$r = 1 + \text{sin} \theta .$$
Evaluate the integral $$\iint_{\RR^{2}} e^{-4 ( x^{2} + y^{2} )} d x d y .$$
